The '''Battle of Dunari's Rest''' was a battle that took place between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] that occurred in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. The engagement began when the [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']] attacked the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[Dunari's Rest]], hoping to flush out any Rebel operatives who had taken refuge on board the station.

==About==
During the year [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] had discovered the existence of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] newly constructed [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]], a massive battle station capable of destroying entire ships and planets. They immediately proceeded to assemble their forces and supplies so that they could destroy the station before it became operational. However, they needed supplies to do the job, and with their own supply caches destroyed by the Empire, they sought assistance from [[Dunari]], who headed a large trading firm. Dunari agreed to help the Rebels, as did his partners, the [[Hurrim]]. Unfortunately, the Hurrim proved to be less than trustworthy and after firing upon civilian and Alliance ships, joined the Empire. Dunari rejected the Hurrim from his trading firm, but the Hurrim retaliated by summoning Imperial forces to attack Dunari's Rest, forcing the Rebels and Dunari to abandon the station.

==Battle==
The Rebels from the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] ''[[Liberty/Legends|Liberty]] ''arrived with a full force of [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]] and [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]] to protect the civilian vessels fleeing the casino. When they arrived, most of the casino patrons had already evacuated, but the remaining ones were attacked by several squadrons of [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Star Wings]]. The rebels repelled them alongside Dunari's security forces, who were flying [[CloakShape fighter/Legends|Cloakshape Fighters]], and the casino employees prepared to abandon the station. Unfortunately, Imperial [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Garreth Holtz]] arrived on the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']] alongside the [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] ''[[Lament]]'', and both vessels immediately launched their [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] and [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]]. The B-wings made short work of the ''Lament'', but the ''Corrupter'' was coming at the station at full speed. The joint Rebel-Casino Security forces fought valiantly and held off wave after wave of enemy fighters until Dunari's employees had evacuated the station. Dunari left the station on the [[Personal Luxury Yacht 3000/Legends|Luxury Yacht]] ''[[Raw Deal]]'' alongside [[Emon Azzameen]], who had been rescued by Dunari and his younger brother [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace]] in a recent engagement. Ace was among the pilots fighting the battle, and they held off the remaining fighters until Dunari had cleared the battlefield. Later, the Imperial [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Cerebus]]'' dropped out of hyperspace to aid in the battle, accompanied by [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]]. However, by this point, the station was totally evacuated, and the Rebels soon retreated back to the ''Liberty ''and the Separatist Cruiser. Dunari's forces also evacuated the area, but the casino was now under Imperial control.

==Aftermath==
The evacuation prevented the Alliance' trade agreement with Dunari from falling apart, and it helped ensure that the rebels would indeed be ready to attack the Death Star II when the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] occurred. It is unknown what became of the casino, as it was captured intact but no known attempt to recapture it was made. Dunari swore revenge against the Hurrim, who were responsible for setting up the Imperial ambush. The Rebels and Dunari's forces would eventually destroy the Hurrim's main base and shut down the group's operations before moving on with their plans to attack the Death Star II. The Rebel Alliance would also exact revenge on the Empire, as [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Garreth Holtz]] and the [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']] were also destroyed with the Hurrim.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
